executives.name: Charl Keyter
executives.background: Charl Keyter was appointed executive director and CFO of Sibanye-Stillwater on 1 January 2013. He has over 25 years of experience in the mining industry and previously held various senior financial roles at Gold Fields Limited.

executives.name: Neal Froneman
executives.background: Neal Froneman was appointed executive director and CEO of Sibanye-Stillwater on 1 January 2013. He has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry. Prior to joining Sibanye-Stillwater, he was CEO of Gold One International Limited and Aflease Gold Limited.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Executive Officer and Executive Director

executives.name: Themba Nkosi
executives.background: Themba Nkosi is the Chief Sustainability Officer. He joined Sibanye-Stillwater in 2016 and has extensive experience in human resources and corporate affairs.

executives.name: Vincent Maphai
executives.background: Dr. Vincent Maphai was appointed as Chairman and non-executive director on 1 June 2019. He has a distinguished career in academia and the private sector, including roles at BHP Billiton South Africa and South African Breweries.
